name: ozone-web-extension
description: Ozone — Chia browser extension wallet (Goby-compatible, coinset.org sync)

scripts.wasm:build: CC_wasm32_unknown_unknown=/usr/local/opt/llvm/bin/clang AR_wasm32_unknown_unknown=/usr/local/opt/llvm/bin/llvm-ar wasm-pack build vendor/sage/crates/sage-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../../../packages/wallet-wasm --release && pnpm wasm:fix-pkg-name
scripts.wasm:build:dev: CC_wasm32_unknown_unknown=/usr/local/opt/llvm/bin/clang AR_wasm32_unknown_unknown=/usr/local/opt/llvm/bin/llvm-ar wasm-pack build vendor/sage/crates/sage-wasm --target web --out-dir ../../../../packages/wallet-wasm --dev && pnpm wasm:fix-pkg-name
